narrative: U.S. equities rallied in the first full week of 2026 as investors leaned into a broadening “rotation” trade (small-caps/cyclicals outperforming) while still rewarding secular AI/semiconductor winners.[Reuters](https://www.reuters.com/business/us-stock-futures-subdued-ahead-crucial-jobs-report-tariff-ruling-2026-01-09/) A mixed December jobs report on Friday helped maintain expectations for additional Fed rate cuts in 2026, supporting risk assets into the close.[Reuters](https://www.reuters.com/business/us-stock-futures-subdued-ahead-crucial-jobs-report-tariff-ruling-2026-01-09/)

value_picks.name: TowneBank
value_picks.why_undervalued: Trading at 49.5% discount to estimated fair value of $72 amid regional banking sector pressures.
value_picks.bull_case: Strong deposit growth from acquisitions, NIM expansion to 3.4%, record core earnings position it for recovery as rates stabilize.

value_picks.name: Old National Bancorp
value_picks.why_undervalued: 49.6% below fair value estimate of $48 after cyclical banking downturn.
value_picks.bull_case: Durable franchise with solid balance sheet; poised for rebound with improving economy and loan growth.

value_picks.name: Seven Hills Realty Trust
value_picks.why_undervalued: REIT trading 49.4% below $18 fair value near 52w lows due to rate sensitivity.
value_picks.bull_case: Positive FCF generation, high yield; rate cuts to boost NAV and dividends.

value_picks.name: Huntington Bancshares
value_picks.why_undervalued: 48.4% discount to $36 fair value in beaten-down financials.
value_picks.bull_case: Reasonable balance sheet, positive FCF; low multiple offers safety margin for multiple expansion.

value_picks.name: Motorcar Parts of America
value_picks.why_undervalued: 48.9% below $26 fair value after cyclical auto parts trough.
value_picks.bull_case: Fundamentally sound with improving demand; undervalued for recovery play.

momentum_picks.name: Aimei Health Technology Co., Ltd.
momentum_picks.catalyst: Explosive December 2025 performance driven by health tech breakout and strong earnings.
momentum_picks.risk_reward: High volatility post-rally but momentum intact if sector heats up.

momentum_picks.name: Sidus Space, Inc.
momentum_picks.catalyst: 395% gain in Dec 2025 from space tech contracts and hype.
momentum_picks.risk_reward: Speculative name with pullback risk but strong short-term trend.

momentum_picks.name: Capricor Therapeutics
momentum_picks.catalyst: 334% Dec surge on biotech trial successes.
momentum_picks.risk_reward: Biotech binary but positive catalysts support continuation.

momentum_picks.name: Credo Technology Group Holding
momentum_picks.catalyst: AI semis demand and 30% earnings growth highlighted in Jan 2026 reports.
momentum_picks.risk_reward: Solid infrastructure play with favorable risk/reward in AI boom.

momentum_picks.name: Ciena Corporation
momentum_picks.catalyst: Zacks #1 momentum stock Jan 9 on network optics demand for AI data centers.
momentum_picks.risk_reward: Established player with earnings upgrades outweighing competition risks.

trends: Small-caps led sharply, signaling improving breadth and investor willingness to add cyclical exposure early in the year.[The Wall Street Journal](https://www.wsj.com/livecoverage/stock-market-today-dow-sp-500-nasdaq-01-09-2026)

Semiconductors/AI infrastructure were key upside drivers inside large caps, with chipmakers contributing meaningfully to index gains.[Reuters](https://www.reuters.com/business/us-stock-futures-subdued-ahead-crucial-jobs-report-tariff-ruling-2026-01-09/)

Fed-cut expectations stayed constructive despite mixed labor data, keeping financial conditions supportive.[Reuters](https://www.reuters.com/business/us-stock-futures-subdued-ahead-crucial-jobs-report-tariff-ruling-2026-01-09/)
risks: Upcoming earnings season (starting with major banks) and CPI data were the next catalysts that could test elevated valuations and the rally’s breadth.[Reuters](https://www.reuters.com/business/wall-st-week-ahead-earnings-start-inflation-data-pose-tests-resilient-us-stocks-2026-01-09/)

Geopolitical headlines remained a tail risk even as markets largely looked through them during the week.[Reuters](https://www.reuters.com/business/wall-st-week-ahead-earnings-start-inflation-data-pose-tests-resilient-us-stocks-2026-01-09/)
sources: [Reuters](https://www.reuters.com/business/us-stock-futures-subdued-ahead-crucial-jobs-report-tariff-ruling-2026-01-09/), [The Wall Street Journal](https://www.wsj.com/livecoverage/stock-market-today-dow-sp-500-nasdaq-01-09-2026), [CNBC](https://www.cnbc.com/2026/01/02/stock-market-today-live-updates.html), [FinancialContent SPX historical table](https://markets.financialcontent.com/stocks/quote/historical?Symbol=CBOE%3ASPX), [Reuters Week Ahead](https://www.reuters.com/business/wall-st-week-ahead-earnings-start-inflation-data-pose-tests-resilient-us-stocks-2026-01-09/), [Reddit 52-week highs/lows post](https://www.reddit.com/r/investingforbeginners/comments/1q8mly8/top_stocks_hitting_52week_highslows_january_9_2026/), [Slickcharts S&P 500 performance table](https://www.slickcharts.com/sp500/performance), [Yahoo Finance AMT historical prices](https://finance.yahoo.com/quote/AMT/history/?p=AMT), [Yahoo Finance](https://finance.yahoo.com/news/january-2026s-stocks-may-trading-113807425.html), [StockTitan](https://www.stocktitan.net/rankings/stock-gains-monthly/2025/december), [Yahoo Growth Stocks](https://finance.yahoo.com/news/january-2026s-top-growth-stocks-113548466.html), [Zacks Momentum](https://finance.yahoo.com/news/best-momentum-stocks-buy-january-150000198.html)
